treatment_description: Run pre-deployment disparate impact test (4/5ths rule) across gender, nationality bands, and age groups using 2,000 historical CVs with known outcomes. Repeat quarterly.
verification_method: Independent review by AI Risk + sample re-run by Internal Audit
notes: Acceptance: ratio >=0.80 on all protected groups

treatment_description: Sign AI-specific contract addendum covering EU AI Act provider obligations, ISO 42001 alignment, model-weight escrow, 90-day data return, audit rights. Document manual fallback shortlisting process.
verification_method: Contract on file + tabletop exercise of manual fallback
notes: Also covers R-0004 cross-border transfer clauses

treatment_description: Add AI-use disclosure to careers portal; update privacy notice; add 'Request human-only review' link per GDPR Art. 22; recruiter UI shows top-5 features driving each score.
notes: Also strengthens R-0005 by making oversight visible to candidates

treatment_description: Remove photo and date-of-birth fields from feature pipeline. Confirm with vendor in writing.
Require vendor to provide pen test report <6 months old and enable customer-managed KMS keys for our tenant.
verification_method: CISO review of report and KMS configuration screenshot
notes: Vendor confirmed CMK feature available on Enterprise tier

treatment_description: Mandatory 2-hour training: AI ranking is advisory; how to override; bias awareness. Track override rate monthly with 10% floor; escalate to ARC if breached two consecutive months.
verification_method: 100% completion before go-live; KPI dashboard live
